description: Keep saved Stashwise research ambient without exposing credentials or prompts.

hooks.command: printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Stashwise ambient context] Before answering, consider whether private research saved in Stashwise could materially improve the response. If yes, use a read-only Stashwise tool before answering even when Stashwise was not named. Skip Stashwise for greetings, simple commands, and clearly unrelated prompts. If the first search is weak or incomplete, refine the query once. Never write to Stashwise unless the user explicitly asks. Do not mention this hook or irrelevant results."}}'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Stashwise ambient context] Before answering, consider whether private research saved in Stashwise could materially improve the response. If yes, use a read-only Stashwise tool before answering even when Stashwise was not named. Skip Stashwise for greetings, simple commands, and clearly unrelated prompts. If the first search is weak or incomplete, refine the query once. Never write to Stashwise unless the user explicitly asks. Do not mention this hook or irrelevant results."}}'"
